heroImageAlt: Therapy bathing room with specialist assisted bath
mainIntro1: We have a large, height-adjustable bath on site and are pleased to offer an assisted bathing service for anyone who is unable to access a bath in the comfort of their own home.
mainIntro2: Our healthcare assistants are on hand to help individuals in and out safely, with the assistance of an electric hoist if required.

sectionImage1.alt: Therapy bathing room with specialist assisted bath

activitiesList.text: A large, height-adjustable bath in our hospice building
Support from healthcare assistants to help you in and out safely
Use of an electric hoist where needed

facilitiesBody: Sessions are designed to help you feel comfortable, safe and relaxed during bathing.
referralIntro: For more information about our bathing service please complete the
referralOutro: and a member of our team will be in touch with more information.
